appliedUpdates.description: Added live browser proof for latency, reconnect recovery, and heartbeat catch-up on the delivery-loop surface.

summary: End-to-end validation is complete. The live browser task surface now has proof for sub-second visible updates, sub-100ms broadcast-to-refetch invalidation on the recovered socket, heartbeat catch-up while the websocket is down, and resumed realtime processing after PartyKit reconnects.
